description: Machine-readable command catalog for vulcan. 37 tools across 8 groups.

groups.market: Market data: prices, orderbooks, candles, funding rates
groups.position: Position management: view, close, reduce, bracket orders
groups.margin: Collateral management: deposit, withdraw, transfer, leverage tiers
groups.history: Trade and account history (not yet implemented)

commands.name: vulcan_market_list
commands.description: List all available perpetual markets on Phoenix DEX with fees and leverage info.

commands.name: vulcan_market_ticker
commands.description: Get real-time ticker data for a market: mark price, funding rate, 24h volume and change.

commands.name: vulcan_market_info
commands.description: Get detailed market configuration: tick size, fees, funding params, leverage tiers.

commands.name: vulcan_market_orderbook
commands.description: Get L2 orderbook snapshot with bids, asks, mid price, and spread.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Number of price levels per side

commands.name: vulcan_market_candles
commands.description: Get historical candlestick (OHLCV) data for a market.

commands.name: vulcan_trade_market_buy
commands.description: Place a market buy order. Executes immediately at best available price.

parameters.name: reduce_only
parameters.description: Order can only reduce existing position

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_trade_market_sell
commands.description: Place a market sell order. Executes immediately at best available price.

parameters.name: reduce_only
parameters.description: Order can only reduce existing position

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_trade_limit_buy
commands.description: Place a limit buy order at a specific price. Rests on the book until filled or cancelled.

parameters.name: reduce_only
parameters.description: Order can only reduce existing position

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_trade_limit_sell
commands.description: Place a limit sell order at a specific price. Rests on the book until filled or cancelled.

parameters.name: reduce_only
parameters.description: Order can only reduce existing position

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_trade_orders
commands.description: List open orders. Omit symbol to list across all markets.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Market symbol. Omit to list all markets.

commands.name: vulcan_trade_cancel
commands.description: Cancel specific orders by their IDs.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.example: vulcan trade cancel SOL --order-ids id1 id2 --yes -o json

commands.name: vulcan_trade_cancel_all
commands.description: Cancel all open orders for a market.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_trade_set_tpsl
commands.description: Set take-profit and/or stop-loss on an existing position. Auto-detects position side.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_trade_cancel_tpsl
commands.description: Cancel take-profit and/or stop-loss on an existing position.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_position_list
commands.description: List all open positions across all markets.

commands.name: vulcan_position_show
commands.description: Show detailed info for a specific position: PnL, margin, liquidation price, TP/SL.

commands.name: vulcan_position_close
commands.description: Close an entire position via market order on the opposite side.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_position_reduce
commands.description: Reduce a position by a specified size via market order on the opposite side.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size to reduce by in base lots

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_position_tp_sl
commands.description: Attach take-profit and/or stop-loss bracket orders to an existing position.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_margin_status
commands.description: Show current margin status: collateral, PnL, risk state, available to withdraw.

commands.name: vulcan_margin_deposit
commands.description: Deposit USDC collateral into the trading account.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_margin_withdraw
commands.description: Withdraw USDC collateral from the trading account.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_margin_transfer
commands.description: Transfer collateral between subaccounts (e.g., cross-margin to isolated).

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_margin_transfer_child_to_parent
commands.description: Sweep all collateral from a child (isolated) subaccount back to cross-margin.

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_margin_sync_parent_to_child
commands.description: Sync parent (cross-margin) state to a child (isolated) subaccount.

parameters.name: child_subaccount
parameters.description: Child subaccount index to sync to

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_margin_leverage_tiers
commands.description: Show leverage tier schedule for a market: max leverage and max size per tier.

commands.name: vulcan_margin_add_collateral
commands.description: Add USDC collateral to an isolated position by symbol.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Market symbol of the isolated position, e.g. SOL

parameters.name: acknowledged
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm dangerous operation

commands.name: vulcan_history_trades
commands.description: Get past trade/fill history. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

commands.name: vulcan_history_orders
commands.description: Get past order history. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

commands.name: vulcan_history_collateral
commands.description: Get collateral deposit/withdrawal history. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

commands.name: vulcan_history_funding
commands.description: Get funding payment history. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

commands.name: vulcan_history_pnl
commands.description: Get PnL history over time. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

commands.name: vulcan_status
commands.description: Health check: verify config, wallet, RPC, API, and trader registration status.

commands.name: vulcan_wallet_list
commands.description: List all stored wallets with names, public keys, and default status.

commands.name: vulcan_wallet_balance
commands.description: Check SOL and USDC balance for a wallet.

commands.name: vulcan_account_info
commands.description: Get trader account info: collateral, positions, risk state.

commands.name: vulcan_account_register
commands.description: Register a new trader account with an invite code.
